summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 71 - Regression Testing After Main.py Migration Complete. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with Arabic RTL layout. No regressions found after server.py to main.py architectural refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Architectural migration successful - server.py is now thin wrapper: 'from main import app'
All application code successfully moved to main.py
4 route modules verified: online_store_routes.py, sendgrid_email_routes.py, sms_marketing_routes.py, stripe_routes.py
All 11 robots running: Inventory, Debt, Report, Customer, Pricing, Maintenance, Profit, Repair, Prediction, Notification, Supplier
Hot reload functioning correctly - backend automatically restarts on code changes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard load correctly with RTL Arabic layout)
